待てど暮らせど、マリナだけが雪上に姿を現さなかった。:
No matter how long they waited,
Marina alone did not surface from the snow.
ううう～～～！<br>どこ掘っても出てこないよぉ～～～！:
Waaahhh~~~!
I'm digging everywhere but she won't come out~~~~!
そ……そうだ！ 炎の魔法で辺り一面焼け野原にすれば、<br>マリナも見つかるんじ:
Oh! That's it! If we use fire magic to incinerate the area,
Marina would turn up, wouldn't she!?
お前の魔力が先に尽きるだろうが。<br>成功しても、それじゃマリナは丸焼けだ。:
Your mana would run out first.
And even if it worked, Marina would be charbroiled.
ご主人さま～……。<br>マ、マリナ、冷凍マリナになっちゃう？:
Master~~~~...
Is... is Marina going to become frozen Marina?
みんな、落ち着け！<br>やみくもに探すには範囲が広すぎる！！:
Everyone, calm down!
The area is too vast to search randomly!!
はやく見つけないと！<br>マリナ、カッチンカチンになっちゃうよ～！:
We need to find her fast!
Marina is going to turn into an ice cube~!
みんな落ち着いて。<br>こういうときは、まず状況の確認と共有が必要なの！:
Everyone calm down.
At times like this, we need to first confirm and share the situation!
さすがソフィアだ。<br>騎士養成学校で習ったのか？:
That's Sophia for you.
Did they teach you that at the knight academy?
ええ。雪上訓練の中で、<br>雪崩に遭ったときの対策も学んでいるわ。:
Yes. In our snow training,
we also learned countermeasures for avalanche encounters.
なるほどな。<br>さすが生徒会長、よく勉強してるな。:
I see.
As expected of the student council president—well prepared.
で、どうやったらマリナの居場所が分かるっての？: So, how do we figure out where Marina is?
え～と……まずは状況の確認。<br>マリナを最後に見た場所は？:
Um... first, confirm the situation.
Where did you last see Marina?
ええと～雪がドバーーーってなったとき、<br>ソフィアとご主人さまの間ぐらいを走:
Umm~ when the snow came CRASHING down,
she was running somewhere between Sophia and Master~...
そうね。私たちはほぼ一団となって同じ方向に逃げていた。<br>それならば私たちが:
Right. We were all running together as a group.
If so, she shouldn’t be too far away.
どこか近くにマリナの所有物なんかが残ってないかしら？<br>帽子とか、リュックと:
Is there anything of Marina's that might have stayed nearby?
Her hat, her pack—there must be some kind of clue!
クルル、いっぱい掘ったけど、何もなかったよ～。: Kururu dug a lot but didn't find anything~.
でもマリナってば、あんなでっかいリュック背負ってたでしょ～？<br>１人だけ雪崩:
But Marina was carrying that huge pack, right~?
What if she got swept much farther away in the avalanche than us~?
確かに、その可能性はあるわね。<br>雪崩が起きた方向は、あっちから、こっちへ…:
That's certainly possible. The direction the avalanche came from
was... from there, toward here...
クルル、もうちょっと向こうの方探してみるね～。: Kururu is going to try searching a little farther away~.
せめて何かマリナの残留物があれば手掛かりになるのに……: If only we had something of Marina's as a clue...
いやいや～、<br>どう考えてもリュックごと流されちゃってるでしょ～。:
No no~, she definitely got swept away
with that giant pack of hers~.
あぁ～、くっそ、俺も同じことを思いついていたのに。: Aww, damn, I was about to come up with that too.
クルル、ポーションの匂いを辿れない？<br>薬草でもいいわ。:
Kururu, can you follow the scent of potions?
Medicinal herbs would work too.
クルルが、雪の上に這いつくばるようにして、<br>匂いを嗅ぎまくる。:
Kururu pressed herself flat against the snow
and sniffed everywhere intensely.
最初こそ、その勢いは凄まじかったが、<br>その旗色の悪さが伝わってくるように、:
At first her energy was remarkable,
but gradually her movements slowed and weakened.
うぅぅぅ～……いっぱいスンスンしたけど、<br>お薬のニオイ……全然しないよぉ～:
Ughhh~... Kururu sniffed and sniffed so much,
but there's no medicine smell... nowhere~.
（ポーションはダメか……何故だ……アイツは何て言ってた？）: (The potions are a dead end... but why... what did she say?)
ずっと気になってたんだけど、<br>その中に入ってるポーションのビンとか、割れち:
I've been wondering—the potion bottles inside
and such, don't they shatter?
はい。割れて中身が漏れたり、栓が抜けて匂いが移ってしまわないように、<br>ちょ:
Yes. I'm using a slightly special storage technique to keep them from
breaking or leaking and getting smells on everything.
マリナは、商人たちが使う特別な収納術を使ってたと言ってた。<br>だから、匂いが:
Marina said she uses the special storage technique that merchants
use. That's why there's no smell!
あー！<br>言ってた、言ってた！:
Ahhh!
She did say that! She did!
雪崩に飲み込まれるほどの衝撃が加わってもビンが割れないって、<br>どんな収納術:
The bottles survive even an avalanche’s force—
what kind of storage technique is this!?
しかもマリナってば、リュックにしまうの異常に早くない～？<br>さっき洞窟でホッ:
And Marina puts things back in her pack abnormally fast, doesn't
she~? Even earlier when we drank hot chocolate in the cave...
さっき、洞窟でマリナにホットチョコレートを売りつけられて、<br>みんなで飲んだ:
Earlier, Marina sold us hot chocolate in the cave
and we all drank it, right?
マリナは、その時、残ったチョコレートだけは<br>リュックの外側のポケットに入れ:
At that time, Marina put the leftover chocolate
in the outer pocket of her pack.
……チョコは、その時、包み紙にくるんであるだけだった。<br>特別な収納術が使わ:
...The chocolate was only wrapped in paper at that point.
I don't think the special storage technique was applied to it.
おにーさん、そういうとこ、<br>やっぱキモい……:
Onii-san, that side of you is just...
creepy after all...
クルル、チョコレートだ！<br>さっきあれだけ飲んだから覚えているだろう？ チョ:
Kururu, it's chocolate! You drank so much of it a moment ago, you
remember that smell, don't you?
あ～～！ さっきの甘いやつ～？ もちろん覚えてる！<br>クルルあんなに甘くてお:
Ohhhh! That sweet stuff~? Of course Kururu remembers!
The sweetest thing Kururu ever had~!
あ……でも、さっき匂いを嗅いだとこは甘い匂いしなかったよ～？: Oh... but I didn't smell anything sweet where I was sniffing before~?
そうか……。だが、もっと先まで流されてる可能性もある。<br>クルル、頼んだぞ！:
I know... but she might be further out. Kururu, I’m counting
on you! Your nose is our best chance!
うんっ！ クルル、がんばるねっ！: Yeah! Kururu will do her best!
クルルは、雪崩が流れた方向に向かって慎重に匂いを嗅いでいく。:
Kururu carefully sniffed along in the direction the avalanche had
flowed.
スンスンスン、スンスンスン……: Sniff sniff sniff, sniff sniff sniff...
私たちが顔を出した場所から随分と離れていくわね。<br>本当にこんなに流されたの:
We've gotten pretty far from where we surfaced.
Did she really get swept this far...
リュックがあの大きさだからね～。<br>ゴロゴロゴロ～～～って凄い勢いで転がって:
Her pack is that big~.
Maybe it went rolling and rolling with incredible momentum~...
あっ、ここ！ ここだよ！！<br>雪の下からチョコの匂い！！:
Ah, here! Right here!!
There's chocolate smell from under the snow!!
よしっ！ でかしたぞクルル！<br>掘れ！ みんな全力で掘りまくれ！！:
YES! Well done, Kururu!
Dig! Everyone dig with everything you've got!!
<user>が指示するまでもなく、<br>全員がクルルの指し示した場所を掘る。掘:
Without needing %user%'s order,
everyone dug at the spot Kururu pointed to. Digging and digging...
呼吸も脈もある……けど、意識がないわ！<br>それに……こんなに体が冷え切ってい:
She's breathing and has a pulse... but she's unconscious!
And... her body is so ice-cold...
顔も真っ青！ 早く温めないと……: Her face is pale blue! We need to warm her up fast...
この声……さっき雪崩が起きた時と同じだ！:
That voice... it's the same one from when the avalanche started
earlier!
さっきより、声がこっちに近いよ～！: The voice is closer to us than before~!
……とにかく、ここは危険だ！<br>マリナを運んで、身を隠す場所を探すぞ！:
...In any case, this place is dangerous!
We'll carry Marina and find somewhere to take cover!
